rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to add offer validity context or remove misleading urgency pressure language from advertising copy.
summary: Add offer validity terms or remove limited-time pressure language that may mislead consumers about availability or pricing.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Limited time, act now, hurry, or countdown urgency language. ACTION: Add clear offer validity dates and terms or remove pressure wording. CHECK: Price history, promotion end date, and stock claims. ESCALATE IF: Fake urgency or inflated reference pricing suspected.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Urgency CTA conflicts with actual offer terms on landing page or checkout.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_remove_terms on ad text; must_include_concepts on rewrite guidance text.

rewrite_independence_rationale: Standalone urgency/disclosure rewrite guidance; not tied to a claim-class Skill Corpus entry.
